jobs.purpose: Daily sweep of Staff rows with probation_ends_at approaching. Fires ProbationEndingSoonNotification to HR + branch manager at 14, 7, and 1 day thresholds. De-duplicated per (staff_id, threshold) so the 14-day reminder never re-fires.
steps: SELECT id, probation_ends_at FROM staff WHERE employment_status = 'active' AND probation_ends_at IS NOT NULL AND probation_ends_at BETWEEN today() AND today() + 14 days AND deleted_at IS NULL
For each: compute days_remaining = probation_ends_at - today()
For each in [14, 7, 1]: if days_remaining == threshold AND no prior notification for (staff_id, threshold) exists in the last 24h: dispatch ProbationEndingSoonNotification

jobs.purpose: Daily sweep of Coach.certifications. Marks entries past expires_at with expired_at timestamp; fires CoachCertificationExpired per newly-expired entry. Also fires 30/14/7-day pre-expiry notifications for certifications approaching expiry (CoachCertificationExpiringNotification).
steps: For each Coach with status IN ('active', 'paused'):
For each certification in coach.certifications where expires_at IS NOT NULL:
If expires_at <= today() AND no expired_at set: set expired_at + fire CoachCertificationExpired
Else if expires_at BETWEEN today()+1 and today()+30: dispatch pre-expiry reminder at [30, 14, 7]-day thresholds (dedup per (coach_id, cert_id, threshold))

jobs.purpose: Nightly audit: verifies EXACTLY one active branch_manager per active branch (or zero, deliberately). Fires a P1 diagnostic event when the invariant is violated (multiple managers per branch, or a manager with employment_status != 'active').
steps: SELECT branch_id, COUNT(*) FROM staff WHERE is_branch_manager=true AND employment_status='active' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY branch_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
For each violating branch: fire a diagnostic event `BranchManagerInvariantViolated` + emit metric academorix.staff.branch_manager.invariant_violations
SELECT branch_id FROM staff WHERE is_branch_manager=true AND employment_status != 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL
For each: same signal (a demoted-but-not-flipped row) — likely a race the observer's SELECT ... FOR UPDATE should have prevented

jobs.purpose: Daily sweep of offboarded Staff rows past the 90-day grace hold on emergency_contact + tax_id_last4. Redacts those confidential fields to '[REDACTED]' while preserving the rest of the row for the 7-year employment record retention. Separately, after 7 years total: hard-deletes rows with no downstream references.
steps: Phase 1 — 90-day PII redaction:
SELECT id FROM staff WHERE employment_status='offboarded' AND ended_at < today() - 90 days AND (emergency_contact_name IS NOT NULL AND emergency_contact_name != '[REDACTED]') LIMIT 2000

For each: UPDATE staff SET emergency_contact_name='[REDACTED]', emergency_contact_phone='[REDACTED]', emergency_contact_relationship='[REDACTED]', tax_id_last4='[REDACTED]'; fire a compliance audit row
Phase 2 — 7-year hard-purge:
SELECT id FROM staff WHERE deleted_at < now() - interval '7 years' LIMIT 500
For each: attempt hard delete; catch FK RESTRICT (Coach not yet purged, PayrollLine (Wave 4) still referencing) and record as 'retention_blocked'

jobs.purpose: Nightly recomputation of Coach.rating + Coach.rating_count from Wave 3+ session-rating rows (scheduling::SessionRating table). Wave 2 ships this as a no-op skeleton — the aggregation query returns zero rows because SessionRating doesn't exist yet. Wave 3+ swap the query in and fire CoachRatingUpdated for each Coach whose rating changed.
steps: For each Coach with status IN ('active', 'paused'):
Query: SELECT AVG(rating), COUNT(*) FROM session_ratings WHERE coach_id = ? AND created_at >= now() - interval '365 days' (Wave 3+; today Wave 2b returns null / 0)
If (avg, count) != (coach.rating, coach.rating_count): UPDATE coach + fire CoachRatingUpdated
Wave 2b: emit metric academorix.staff.aggregate_ratings.wave_3_placeholder to signal the job ran with no effect
